_note: TEMPLATE (ADR-0029). Copy to config/plant_profiles.local.json (gitignored) and describe YOUR plants. This is the slowly-changing DIMENSION the inference tier (PRD-0008) joins to telemetry facts on the stable plant_id (ADR-0027) — it is NOT telemetry (never on the wire, never per-row). Storage mirrors the device registry: this template ships committed with PLACEHOLDER values; the real instance (pot sizes + home placement = your windowsill) stays local-only per ADR-0015. Every field is ABSENT-SAFE (ADR-0028): a plant is fully monitored with only plant_id + label; everything else sharpens prediction. species_guess carries species_confidence (a guess is labelled a guess, ADR-0006); effective_size_class is an explicit judgement distinct from the measured diameter_in; open_questions is first-class so the model never forces false certainty. Vocabularies are in ADR-0029 §4. Placeholder values below.

care.rejuvenation_routine: example — quarterly sink soak + leaf spray, 30-min drip-dry

plants.label: p02
plants.open_questions: example — a minimal, sensorless profile: plant_id + label is a complete entry; a sensorless plant is monitored nowhere yet but still a first-class record (ADR-0028).
